_comment: AZO Discord sync config. (1) Replace guildId with your server ID. (2) List the EXACT Discord role names (case-sensitive) that should appear as endorsements. (3) Put the role name(s) that mean senior/junior leadership. These EXAMPLE role names are placeholders — replace them with your real roles. Until guildId is set AND the DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN secret exists, the sync workflow skips quietly. See DISCORD_SETUP.md.
